历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were 6195→3830→5077→4051→4510, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2022, it peaked at 3830 and then declined, oscillating between 4051 and 5077 from 2023 to 2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 4510. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan for Physics Category/Science was 267 in 2021, 261 in 2022, 250 in 2023, 250 in 2024, and 251 in 2025. For 2026, the Physics Category has 203 places plus 45 for Medical, totaling 248, a slight reduction of about 1.2% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. On the Soft Science ranking, it placed 14th in 2021→11th in 2022→12th in 2023→15th in 2024→15th in 2025→16th in 2026, consistently among the top 16 nationally, belonging to the top-tier university group. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, with 51 recorded incidents (46 negative), mainly involving teacher ethics, academic misconduct, and other public opinion issues, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with moderate attention on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese History A, etc. It has balanced strengths in medicine, humanities, and science/engineering, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended, aligning with Sichuan University's advantageous engineering fields. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 377,900, with an estimated 229,000 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 60.7%, an increase of approximately 32% compared to 173,282 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (neighboring province), geographically close and culturally similar to Yunnan, making it a popular choice for Yunnan candidates. The university has a large enrollment scale in Yunnan (about 250 in Physics Category), making it one of the 985 universities with the highest enrollment in Yunnan. Regional preference positively supports application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4510, a slight enrollment reduction of about 1.2% in 2026, a significant increase of about 32% in Physics Category candidates in the province, negative reputation incidents that may suppress some application willingness, strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, and regional preference, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with the ranking moving slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4508, with a range of 4008–5008.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家『985工程』和『211工程』重点建设高校，入选国家『双一流』建设高校（A类），综合实力位居全国前列。其华西医学中心历史悠久 、声誉卓著，口腔医学、临床医学等学科在全国处于顶尖水平，对高分考生具有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续攀升，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。四川大学地处西南中心城市成都，地域优势明显，对云南考生有较强的就近吸引力。2026 年云南省医学类招生规模整体稳定，但四川大学医学类计划缩减3人，进一步推高了录取门槛。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素，预计2026年四川大学医学类在云南省最低录取位次约为7534名，较2025年的7869名略有上升（位次数字减小，录取难度加大）。波动区间预计在7034至8034名之 间。建议考生结合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Sichuan University's medical programs in Yunnan Province over the past five years have fluctuated significantly: 13,313 in 2021, a sharp rise to 3,689 in 2022 (anomalously high due to separate batch enrollment that year), falling back to 11,010 in 2023, roughly stable at 11,534 in 2024, and a notable increase to 7,869 in 2025. In terms of enrollment plans: 42 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 48 in 2023, expanded to 52 in 2024, reduced back to 48 in 2025, and further reduced to 45 in 2026, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a reduction of approximately 6.25%. The reduction in planned enrollment means intensified competition, exerting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a national 'Double First-Class' construction university (Category A), with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its West China Medical Center has a long history and outstanding reputation, with disciplines such as Stomatology and Clinical Medicine at the top level nationwide, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has continued to rise, with core programs such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology facing particularly intense competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, a central city in Southwest China, with obvious regional advantages, exerting a strong nearby appeal to Yunnan candidates. In 2026, the overall enrollment scale for medical programs in Yunnan Province remains stable, but Sichuan University's medical program plan is reduced by 3, further raising the admission threshold.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors, it is estimated that the minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical programs in Yunnan Province in 2026 will be approximately 7,534, slightly higher (smaller ranking number, increased admission difficulty) compared to 7,869 in 2025. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 7,034 and 8,034. Candidates are advised to position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
